description: The Silver Wings fragrance for men from police has notes of coriander, lemon, apple blossom, sage and amber wood. An initial spiciness of its top notes, rich in coriander and nutmeg, fuses without sparks into the classical notes of citrus and violet leaves. This fragrance is perfect for everyday wear.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
